hero.title: Create new ad
hero.subtitle: Connect with hundreds of outdoor enthusiasts!

info.title: Ad information
info.description: Enter a title, description and upload an image for the ad.

customize.title: Customise your ad
customize.description: Pick the right category, relevant keywords and campaign period.

fields.title: Title
fields.keywordsHint: Pick keywords and categories to associate with the ad.

basic.title: Basic
basic.description: An affordable starter package with lower cost per click and small budgets.

standard.title: Standard
standard.description: A good balance between price and visibility. Fits most advertisers.

premium.title: Premium
premium.description: Strong visibility with higher bids and a larger daily budget.

messages.success: The ad is registered. You can now return to the advertiser portal.
messages.errorWaitForUpload: Please wait for the image to finish uploading before submitting the ad.
messages.errorServer: Could not reach the server. Check that the API is running.
messages.errorImageType: Please choose an image file (jpg, png or similar).

portal.title: Advertiser portal
portal.intro: Here you can manage your ads.

filters.hint: Filter your ads by status to find campaigns faster.

analytics.title: Ad analytics
analytics.showing: Showing {{count}} ads for the current filter.

empty.noMatch: No ads match your search or filter. Try a different search or reset the filter.

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this ad?
